Oracc: CAMS/GKAB — CAMS Geography of Knowledge Corpus

SpTU 5, 261 [Enuma Anu Enlil Varia][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
oo NaN  (start of obverse missing)
o 1'o 1'

[...] MIN KUR ⸢ŠU?⸣ [...]

(o 1') [...] ditto: the land ... [...].

o 2'2'

[... mulSAG.ME].⸢GAR⸣ [...] MIN KUR MIN? x x [...]

(o 2') [...] Jupiter [...] ditto: the land ... [...].

o 3'3'

[... mulSAG].⸢ME⸣.[GAR ina iti]⸢KIN⸣ MIN KUR NINDA DU₁₀.⸢GA⸣ [GU₇]

(o 3') [...] Jupiter in Ululu (VI) ditto: the land [will eat] good bread.

o 4'4'

[...] x [...] x-ma ⸢TUKU?⸣ [...]

(o 4') [...] ... [...] ... and ... [...].

o 5'5'

[...] ⸢LUGAL⸣ ana LUGAL ze-ra-a-ti KINar₂

(o 5') [...] a king will send hostile messages to (another) king.

o 6'6'

⸢*⸣ [... ina] ⸢iti⸣GAN MIN ⸢KUR!?(KAM.U)KUR ana kurURIki GUN IL₂ši

(o 6') (If) [... in] Kislimu (IX) ditto: the lands will carry tribute to Akkad.

o 7'7'

* [... NIG₂].GIG ina KUR i-min₃-da

(o 7') (If) [...] there will be many troubles in the land.

o 8'8'

* [...] AB.SIN₂ GUN ⸢IL₂⸣ši

(o 8') (If) [...] the furrow will bring (its) yield.

o 9'9'

* [...] ⸢IA₂? MAN?⸣ SILIMma KIN[ar₂]

(o 9') (If) [...] ... will send peaceful messages.

o 10'10'

* [...] ⸢DUMU it-ti⸣ [AD]-šu₂ ⸢kit⸣-te i-ta-me

(o 10') (If) [...] the son will speak the truth with his father.

o 11'11'

* ⸢mulSAG⸣.ME.⸢GAR⸣ [ina KASKAL] ⸢šu⸣-ut da-nu IGI ILLU GAL₂-ma  ; ⸢BURU₁₄⸣ KUR SI.SA₂

(o 11') (If) Jupiter appears [in the path] of Anu: there will be a flood and the harvest of the land will thrive.

o 12'12'

[*] ⸢mul⸣SAG.ME.⸢GAR⸣ ina KASKAL šu-ut dEN.LIL₂ IGI DUMU  ; LUGAL AD-šu₂ ḪI.GAR-ma AŠ.TE DAB

(o 12') (If) Jupiter appears in the path of Ellil: the king's son will revolt against his father and seize the throne.

o 13'13'

* ⸢mul⸣SAG.ME.GAR ina KASKAL šu-ut de₂-a IGI  ; LUGAL KAL-ma ⸢KUR₂-šu₂?⸣ ḪI.GAR KURad₂

(o 13') (If) Jupiter appears in the path of Ea: the king will become strong and defeat his enemy in a rebellion.

o 14'14'

* muldele-bat ina KASKAL šu-ut d⸢a⸣-[nu IGI ...]

(o 14') (If) Venus [appears] in the path of Anu [...].

o 15'15'

* muldele-bat ina KASKAL šu-ut dEN.⸢LIL₂⸣ IGI LUGAL URIki GABA.RI NU TUKUši

(o 15') (If) Venus appears in the path of Ellil: the king of Akkad will not acquire an opponent.

o 16'16'

* muldele-bat ina KASKAL šu-ut de₂-a IGI LUGAL MAR.TUki GABA.RI <NU> TUKUši

(o 16') (If) Venus appears in the path of Ea: the king of Amurru will not acquire an opponent.

o 17'17'

* muldele-bat ina KASKAL šu-ut da-nu KURḫa na-⸢ḫa-aš₂ kurELAM.MAki⸣

(o 17') (If) Venus rises in the path of Anu: prosperity of Elam.

o 18'18'

* muldele-bat ina KASKAL šu-ut dEN.LIL₂ KURḫa na-ḫaš kurURIki

(o 18') (If) Venus rises in the path of Ellil: prosperity of Akkad.

o 19'19'

* muldele-bat ina KASKAL šu-ut de₂-a KURḫa na-ḫaš kurMAR.TUki

(o 19') (If) Venus rises in the path of Ea: prosperity of Amurru.

o 20'20'

* ina itiBARA₂ mulUDU.IDIM KURḫa BURU₁₄ KUR SI.SA₂

(o 20') (If) a planet rises in Nisannu (I): the harvest of the land will thrive.

o 21'21'

* ina itiGU₄ MIN<(mulUDU.IDIM)> KURḫa KUR BI MUNUS.KUR₂ IGImar

(o 21') (If) ditto (a planet rises) in Ayyaru (II): that land will experience enmity.

o 22'22'

* ina itiSIG₄ MIN<(mulUDU.IDIM)> KURḫa KUR GANBA LA₂⸢a⸣ GU₇

(o 22') (If) ditto (a planet rises) in Simanu (III): the land will experience decreased business.

o 23'23'

* ina itiŠU MIN<(mulUDU.IDIM)> KURḫa UŠ₂-MEŠ [...]

(o 23') (If) ditto (a planet rises) in Duʾuzu (IV): [...] deaths.

o 24'24'

* ina itiNE MIN<(mulUDU.IDIM)> KURḫa ne-ru-ba-a-⸢ti⸣ [...]

(o 24') (If) ditto (a planet rises) in Abu (V): [...] flights.

o 25'25'

* ina itiKIN MIN<(mulUDU.IDIM)> KURḫa E₁₁ GANBA [...]

(o 25') (If) ditto (a planet rises) in Ululu (VI): rise in business [...].

Reverse
r 1r 1

⸢*⸣ ina ⸢iti⸣[DU₆ MIN<(mulUDU.IDIM)> KURḫa LUGAL] KUR KUR₂ la₃ UR₅tu₂ ḫi-pi₂[(...)]

(r 1) (If) [ditto (a planet rises) in Tašritu (VII): the king] - a hostile land that is not his (gloss: break).

r 22

* ina ⸢iti⸣APIN MIN<(mulUDU.IDIM)> KURḫa KUR kar-mu-tu₂ ([MIN<(ḫi-pi₂])>)

(r 2) (If) ditto (a planet rises) in Arahsamnu (VIII): the land, ruin, ditto (gloss: break).

r 33

* ⸢ina iti⸣[GAN] MIN<(mulUDU.IDIM)> KURḫa dIŠKUR ([MIN<(ḫi-pi₂])>)

(r 3) (If) ditto (a planet rises) in Kislimu (IX): Adad, ditto (gloss: break).

r 44

* ⸢ina⸣ [itiAB] MIN<(mulUDU.IDIM)> KURḫa ŠUBti GIG ([MIN<(ḫi-pi₂])>)

(r 4) (If) ditto (a planet rises) in Ṭebetu (X): epidemic of the sick, ditto (gloss: break).

r 55

* ⸢ina⸣ [itiZIZ₂] MIN<(mulUDU.IDIM)> KURḫa ŠA₃ KUR DU₁₀ab KUR (MIN<(ḫi-pi₂)>)

(r 5) (If) ditto (a planet rises) in Šabaṭu (XI): the land will be satisfied; the land, ditto (gloss: break).

r 66

* [ina itiŠE] MIN<(mulUDU.IDIM)> KURḫa ⸢ŠUB⸣ti ⸢SIG₅⸣ (MIN<(ḫi-pi₂)>)

(r 6) (If) ditto (a planet rises) in Addaru (XII): epidemic of the best of ditto (gloss: break).

r 77

* ⸢ina itiDIRI⸣.ŠE.KIN.KU₅ MIN<(mulUDU.IDIM)> KURḫa ⸢KUR me-ser⸣ (MIN<(ḫi-pi₂)>)

(r 7) (If) ditto (a planet rises) in intercalary Addaru (XII/2): the land, hardship, ditto (gloss: break).

r 88

* ⸢ina⸣ [...] mulṣal-bat-a-nu IGIir MU 3-KAM ŠEG₃-ME

(r 8) (If) Mars appears in [...]: the 3rd year, the rains [...] will be early; the cultivated land will not thrive; (at) the end of the year, Adad will devastate [the harvest] (or): he will destroy (it); the enemy will attack the land and [...] of that enemy will run away from its main army and the exit [...]; there will be chaos in the land; evil [...]; he will approach lands that are not his (gloss: break).

r 99

[... ḫar]-pu GAN₂.ZI NU SI.SA₂ TIL MU dIŠKUR

r 1010

[BURU₁₄?] ⸢RA?⸣ṣi : u₂-šal-pat lu₂KUR₂ ana KUR ZI-ma

r 1111

[... lu₂]KUR₂ BI ina DUGUD-ša₂ ZAḪ₂-⸢ma⸣ KI.E₃.A

r 1212

[...] ⸢SUḪ₃?-MEŠ⸣ ina KUR GAL₂-MEŠ ⸢ḪULti₃⸣

r 1313

[...] KUR-MEŠ la₃ UR₅tu₂ TE ḫi-pi₂

r 1414

[...] ⸢KI⸣.NU₂ qu-ra-du DAGAL ḫi-pi₂

(r 14) [...] the beds of heroes will be wide (gloss: break).

r 1515

[...] KUR KISLAḪ₃ DABbat

(r 15) [...] the land will be afflicted by distress.

r 1616

[...] ⸢ŠA₃⸣ KUR DU₁₀ab BURU₁₄ KUR SI.SA₂

(r 16) [...] the land will be satisfied; the harvest of the land will thrive.

r 1717

* [...] LUGAL ana LUGAL SILIMma KINar₂

(r 17) (If) [...] a king will send peaceful messages to (another) king.

r 1818

* ina iti[APIN] ⸢MIN⸣ KUR me-ser KALA.GA IGImar

(r 18) (If) ditto in [Arahsamnu (VIII)]: the land will experience severe hardship.

r 1919

* ina iti⸢GAN.GAN⸣ MIN BURU₁₄ KUR SI.SA₂ : dIŠKUR RAiṣ

(r 19) (If) ditto in Kislimu (IX): the harvest of the land will thrive; Adad will devastate.

r 2020

* ina itiAB MIN KUR ⸢KI.TUŠ⸣ ne-eḫ-ti TUŠab

(r 20) (If) ditto in Ṭebetu (X): the land will dwell in peace.

r 2121

* ina itiZIZ₂ MIN ŠUBti ⸢um⸣-ma-ni ina ki-di GAL₂

(r 21) (If) ditto in Šabaṭu (XI): there will be an epidemic of the army in the countryside.

r 2222

* ina itiŠE MIN ILLAT ⸢KUR₂ KUR⸣ u₂-šad-ma-ma

(r 22) (If) ditto in Addaru (XII): the reinforcements of the enemy will make the land moan.

r 2323

* ina itiDIRI.ŠE.KIN.KU₅ MIN!(A) BAL LUGAL DAGAL BURU₁₄ KUR SI.SA₂

(r 23) (If) ditto in intercalary Addaru (XII/2): the king's reign will increase; the harvest of the land will thrive.

r 2424

[...] gi-na-a ḫi-il-lu ar-mu

(r 24) [...] are constantly covered by a covering.

r 2525

[...] ⸢MU⸣-DIDLI BAR-MEŠ : U₄ AN dEN.LIL₂.⸢LA₂⸣

(r 25) [...] non-canonical lines of 'When Anu, Ellil' [...] series not recorded in accordance with the wording of the tablet [...].

r 2626

[... EŠ₂].GAR₃ la₃ šaṭ-ru ki-i KA IM [...]

r 2727

[...] ⸢E₂⸣ [...]

(r 27) [...] ... [...].
